title: Rotkäppchen
description:
Charles Perrault’s version of  the folk tale _Petite chaperon rouge_ was retold in German by the Grimm Brothers as _Rotkäppchen_, and retold in many English translations as _Little Red Riding Hood_.

A little girl on her way to visit her grandmother meets a hungry wolf in the forest.
subjects: British and irish fiction (fictional works by one author)
